name: maze of caves
description: I'm in a maze of caves
hints: A maze of caves! All the rooms look alike. Drop items to mark your path.
N loops back to this same room (25). S and W both go to room 27. E goes to room 26.
To navigate the maze: from here go S or W to reach room 27, then N to room 28 (the exit with guano).
N=25 (loop). S=27. E=26. W=27. Drop items to map. Goal: reach room 28 (has opening and bat guano).
notes: Maze room. N=25 (self-loop). S=27. E=26. W=27. Drop items to map. Target: room 28 (opening + guano).
